narrative:
Cols 69-M (precinct in Franklin County) has 921 registered voters, with 67.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
